title: Katakuri Forces Luffy Past His Limit
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Big Mom, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Brook as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just discharge all that! You'll feel better.:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is the least amount of damage we could get away with, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: She beat us up pretty bad!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah. He says he doesn't have enough energy to go wild any more.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wasn't asking you to be my friend.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Do you want to be my slave?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Or do you want to die?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 30 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
